ques: Compare prices for economy class round-trip flights from Dubai to Rome, departing on July 1, 2026, and returning on July 8, 2026, and select the option with the fewest stops.
answer: Could not complete the price comparison — the search was correctly set up (round-trip Economy Dubai→Rome, depart 2026-07-01, return 2026-07-08, Nonstop filter applied for fewest stops), but Google Flights' results backend repeatedly returned "Oops, something went wrong / No results returned," so no prices or flight options could be retrieved.
